hero.title: Notices, prayer resources, and parish voice in one clear stream
hero.lede: The parish publishes a steady rhythm of bulletins, weekly highlights, prayer resources, Pope Francis reflections, and downloadable documents.

intro.title: Regular parish sections already in use
intro.body: The live parish site groups its communication around newsletters, weekly highlights, the diary, bidding prayers, spiritual reflection, penitential resources, and Pope Francis' words.

cards.title: Weekly Highlights
paragraphs: The parish highlights page carries current notices for Lent and Holy Week, volunteering, bishop visits, and practical parish updates.

cards.title: Parish Newsletters
paragraphs: Upload a new PDF newsletter below in the CMS and it will appear automatically in this list.

cards.title: Bidding Prayers
paragraphs: Prayer material, seasonal liturgy notes, and related downloads can be gathered locally with the parish documents.

cards.title: Reflections
paragraphs: Reflections, weekly notices, and parish documents can be browsed together without leaving the parish site.

cards.title: Vatican News / Pope
paragraphs: The parish currently surfaces Vatican-related reflection through the Pope Francis' Words category and synod material.
